# Azafaran

> Azafaran is a halal meat delivery mobile application serving Barcelona and its metropolitan area in Spain. Customers order halal-certified lamb, beef, chicken, ground meat, halal sausages and marinated cuts from the app; orders are delivered chilled within 24–48 hours, with free shipping on orders over €30.

## Facts

- **Name**: Azafaran
- **What it is**: Halal meat delivery mobile app (iOS + Android)
- **Where**: Barcelona, Spain — city and metropolitan area (L'Hospitalet de Llobregat, Badalona, Santa Coloma de Gramenet, Cornellà, Esplugues, Sant Adrià de Besòs, El Prat, Castelldefels, Gavà, Sant Boi, Sant Pere de Ribes, Vilanova i la Geltrú, Sitges)
- **Languages**: Spanish, Catalan, English
- **Certification**: 100% halal-certified meat from traceable suppliers
- **Delivery time**: 24–48 hours, customer chooses the time slot
- **Free shipping**: Orders over €30
- **Payments**: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay — processed by Stripe; card data is never stored
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Address**: Carrer de la Torreta, 37, 08810 Sant Pere de Ribes, Barcelona, Spain
- **Contact**: hola@azafaran.es · +34 647 63 61 89
- **Social**: instagram.com/azafaran1 · facebook.com/azafaran1
- **Download**: App Store (https://apps.apple.com/app/azafaran) · Google Play (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=es.azafaran.app)

## Pages

- [Home (Spanish)](https://www.azafaran.es/): Product overview, download links.
- [Home (Catalan)](https://www.azafaran.es/ca/): Same content in Català.
- [Home (English)](https://www.azafaran.es/en/): Same content in English.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.azafaran.es/privacy): GDPR-compliant privacy policy.
- [Terms and conditions](https://www.azafaran.es/terms): Terms of service.

## Frequently asked

- **What does halal-certified mean?** The slaughter follows halal precepts and the product is certified by a recognised body. Azafaran works only with certified, traceable suppliers.
- **Which areas does Azafaran deliver to?** The city of Barcelona and its metropolitan area — including L'Hospitalet, Badalona, Sant Adrià, Castelldefels, Gavà, Sant Boi, Sant Pere de Ribes and Sitges.
- **How much does shipping cost?** Free on orders over €30; a flat fee below that, shown before checkout.
- **Is the meat fresh or frozen?** All orders ship fresh and chilled in insulated packaging.
- **How do I download the app?** Free on the App Store (iPhone) or Google Play (Android); search "Azafaran".
